styleModeOutlineDesc: Text with outline and shadow, works for most videos
styleModeBoxDesc: Text on a color block, clearer over busy footage
outlineWidthHint: Thickness of the text outline; 0 means no outline. An outline greatly improves readability when subtitles blend into the footage
shadowHint: Offset of the drop shadow at the lower right of the text; 0 means no shadow
backgroundOpacityHint: Opacity of the background block: 100% fully covers the footage, lower values let it show through
boxPaddingHint: Space between the text and the edge of the background box; larger values make the block roomier
marginsHint: Distance between subtitles and the frame edges; affects position and line-wrap width
selectVideoToPreview: Please select a video file to preview
outputModeHardcodeDesc: Subtitles rendered into the picture, works in every player (slower)
outputModeSoftmuxDesc: Finishes in seconds, lossless quality, toggleable in players
videoQualityHint: Burn-in re-encodes the video. Original stays closest to the source with the largest file; Standard is smaller with slightly lower quality. Soft-mux is lossless and unaffected by this option.
styleOnlyForHardcode: Soft subtitle appearance is controlled by the player. Style settings below only apply to burn-in mode
outputPathRequiredHint: Video and subtitle are selected — choose an output path before merging
pageDesc: Burn subtitles into the video, or mux them as a soft subtitle track
